get.description:
***
The GraphQl query for this endpoint is:
``` graphql
query cbt_TRIP {
  data:cbt_TRIP {
    COMMUN_ID
    CREATE_BY
    CREATE_DATE
    ESTM_EXPENSE
    STATUS_ID
    TRIPINFO_EN
    TRIPINFO_TH
    TRIP_ID
    TRIP_NAME
    TRIP_NAMT
    UPDATE_BY
    UPDATE_DATE
  }
}
```
